installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Install dependencies
apt update
apt install -y git

# Clone repo
if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then
  echo "No repo URL provided"
  exit 1
fi

git clone $REPO_URL /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Install node deps
npm install

# Build project (if needed)
npm run build || true

# Done
echo "Installation completed"
